plugin_desc: Gude Expert Power Control, PDU, ATS and ETS network-service SNMP baseline child template for devices under Gude PEN 28507. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts confirm PDU8310 power, channel status and ETS primary or secondary power-availability tables, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private health and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
